description: A designed White House messaging graphic in a tall portrait format with a photo and a dark navy gradient overlay at the bottom. The photograph shows President Donald Trump from roughly the knees up, standing in the White House Rose Garden / colonnade area in front of a row of American flags, wearing a navy overcoat over a dark suit, white shirt and red tie, with his right fist raised in a triumphant/defiant gesture and a serious expression. At the top, in white all-caps serif (Trajan-style) lettering, is the headline 'DECEMBER CPI REPORT'. Across the lower navy band, large white bold sans-serif text reads 'Inflation Remains Low & Stable; Economy Continues to Blow Past Expectations'. Centered at the very bottom is the white line-art White House emblem with 'THE WHITE HOUSE / WASHINGTON' wordmark. The composition pairs an authoritative, victorious image of the President with an economic-good-news headline to credit the administration for low inflation and a strong economy. Propaganda technique: leader glorification plus selective economic statistics framed as triumph. Target audience: general public / supporters consuming economic-success messaging.
notable_text: DECEMBER CPI REPORT / Inflation Remains Low & Stable; Economy Continues to Blow Past Expectations
